name: docs-forge
description: Generate structured, framework-ready documentation from a codebase.

interface.shortDescription: Generate structured docs from real code.
interface.longDescription: Docs Forge creates framework-ready engineering and product documentation by ingesting a codebase, building an on-disk knowledge base, eliciting missing intent, and assembling docs for frameworks such as Fumadocs, Docusaurus, Mintlify, Nextra, Starlight, and MkDocs.
defaultPrompt: Document this codebase with Docs Forge.
Create API reference docs from this repo.
Set up a docs site for this project.
